# CalculiX independent solver fixture

`uniaxial-bar-8.inp` is the solver-neutral Kotoba 8-element uniaxial bar case
expressed as a CalculiX input deck. `uniaxial-bar-8.frd` was generated by
CalculiX CrunchiX 2.16 using:

```sh
docker run --rm --platform linux/amd64 \
  -v "$PWD/test/fixtures/calculix:/work" -w /work \
  calculix/ccx@sha256:b18b56fec00ad965d85e091454f26195d62115ee9a05feb4c130fa15406b6f7a \
  ccx uniaxial-bar-8
```

The CalculiX project identifies the solver as GPL software. Source and project
documentation: <https://www.dhondt.de/>.

SHA-256:

- input: `31bfbcab4124be710eacbdc6db813449e5e14bf46f0528b3bed07e1a9c2e54e8`
- FRD result: `e032d250c876fdbac42e64e2b2238eed448d127cebf960cb76622a83085d4465`
